summary: Verified the new adaptive AI awakening conversation flow (Claude Sonnet 4.5). Backend: 7/8 pytest tests PASS in /app/backend/tests/test_awakening_chat.py. The real conversational path reached done:true in 10 turns (9 user answers) and produced a UNIQUE class_title='Artisan du Réel Enraciné' plus unique poetic skills (no 'Discipline'/'Focus'/'Warrior'/'Mage'). Profile persisted, skills>=3 unique, quests main/sub/daily/parallel all populated, achievements>=6. Only failure is test_legacy_initiate_still_works due to transient EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget exhaustion AFTER the full conversation ($1.42 cost > $1.40 cap) -- not a code defect. A follow-up curl confirmed the chat endpoint recovered. Frontend: /awakening intro renders, 'Initier l'éveil' loads chat UI, first AI SYSTEM bubble appears, user Enter-submit produces user bubble + next AI question, AI adapts and doesn't repeat. No UI errors.

minor.issue: Transient 500 'Budget has been exceeded' from EMERGENT_LLM_KEY after long conversational run. Env/quota issue, not logic. The synchronous retry loop inside legacy initiate (up to 4 retries) amplifies token spend; consider reducing to 1-2 retries or shorter forced-JSON prompts.

Design note (not a bug): AI is strict — it will refuse to finalize until it gets truly substantive answers on every dimension. In automated testing this means canned answers may need to actually *respond* to the AI's last question (our rich answers covering the 8 dims did succeed in 10 turns).

action_items: Consider lowering the legacy /api/profile/initiate retry loop from 4 to 1-2 to reduce LLM token burn and avoid tripping the EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget cap.
Add a safety guard in awaken_chat_turn: if history user-message count >= 12, append a single 'FORCE JSON NOW' instruction so the AI cannot keep probing indefinitely in edge cases.
Top-up/rotate EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget (transient issue observed during this test run).
critical_code_review_comments: ai_system.SYSTEM_CONVERSATION prompt is excellent at producing unique poetic class_titles and skills (verified: 'Artisan du Réel Enraciné' + unique skills). Good guardrails against 'Discipline'/'Focus'/'Warrior'/'Mage'.
_extract_json() correctly strips markdown fences and recovers JSON even when wrapped. Robust.
server._save_architecture deletes profile/quests/skills/achievements before inserting — idempotent re-initiation works.
Heads-up: server.awaken_chat passes the full transcript (truncated to 2000 chars) as about_me. Fine for MVP but could grow; consider storing transcript in a separate collection.

server._extract_name_from_history only checks the FIRST user message. If the name appears later (common when AI asks environment first then identity), name will fallback to arch.hunter_name — OK because prompt explicitly asks Claude to echo hunter_name.

Legacy /api/profile/initiate forces JSON with up to 4 extra LLM turns when Claude doesn't finalize; each turn is a full chat completion -> expensive. Recommend 1-2 retries + shorter prompt 'RÉPONDS UNIQUEMENT avec le JSON READY'.
Awakening.jsx correctly awaits onInitiated() (profile refresh) before navigate('/') — no redirect flash.
Awakening.jsx chat input autofocus + Enter-to-send + thinking indicator + scroll-to-bottom all working cleanly.
Consider: no way for the user to abort/restart mid-conversation. Minor UX gap.

success_rate.backend: 87.5% (7/8 pytest; the 1 failure is an LLM budget quota issue, not code)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (intro → chat → adaptive multi-turn all verified via Playwright)

test_credentials: n/a (mono-user, no auth). EMERGENT_LLM_KEY used for Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations.
seed_data_creation: Tests call POST /api/reset before initiating. Test profile names prefixed with TEST_ (TEST_Alex, TEST_Legacy).
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_awakening_chat.py::completed_conversation runs the FULL real adaptive convo (~8-12 turns, 1-2 minutes of Claude time). It has a fallback to /api/profile/initiate if the AI refuses to finalize. Full suite takes ~2 min and burns ~$1 of EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget. Budget cap is ~$1.40 so running it twice in a row may exhaust the key temporarily. The legacy /api/profile/initiate internally loops up to 4x -> expensive. All unique-skill/class assertions passed on real run: class_title='Artisan du Réel Enraciné', skills included 'Présence Charnelle'-style unique names.
rca of the issue: No code bug found. Transient LLM budget cap hit at end of full test run (cost 1.42 > 1.40). Solution: reduce legacy retry count and/or refresh EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget. All functional requirements from the review_request are met: empty-messages opening is French + done:false; multi-turn progresses without repeat; real convo completes in ~10 turns with UNIQUE class/skills; profile/skills/quests/achievements persist correctly; frontend chat UI works end-to-end.
